## What this changes

<!-- Brief description of the change and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill (`skills/<name>/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] New tool (`lib/tools/<category>.js`)
- [ ] New strategy (`lib/strategies/`)
- [ ] Config / default change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `node agent.js wallet` — passes
- [ ] `node agent.js scan` — passes
- [ ] `node agent.js send "test"` — LLM responds correctly
- [ ] Relevant tool tested manually (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, `data/`, `config/agent.local.json`, or `soul.local.md` committed
- [ ] No new npm dependencies without discussion (or justified below)
- [ ] Follows code style in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
